testcase.name: test_search_celebrity

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'name' in {'celebrity': {'age': 0, 'bio': 'Taylor Alison Swift is an American singer-songwriter. An influential figure in popular culture, she is known for her autobiographical songwriting and artistic reinventions. Swift is the highest-grossing live music artist, the wealthiest female musician, and one of the best-selling music artists of all time.', 'birth_year': 0, 'buzz_score': 0, ...}}

testcase.name: test_search_returns_tier
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_21_recognition_score.py:233: in test_search_returns_tier assert data["tier"] == "A", f"Taylor Swift should be A-list, got {data['tier']}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'tier'
